Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi M1 Bus Timetable - From Dalma Mall to Capital Mall and Back

October 31, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

This service provides residents and visitors easy access to shopping, dining, and entertainment options.

Operational Details

The M1 bus operates throughout the day, ensuring a convenient service for commuters and shoppers. Below are the key timings for the M1 bus departing from both Dalma Mall Main Entrance and Capital Mall:

From Dalma Mall From Capital Mall
05:15 06:02
06:15 07:02
06:51 08:02
07:15 09:02
07:51 10:02
08:15 11:02
08:51 12:02
09:15 13:02
09:51 14:02
10:15 15:02
10:51 16:02
11:15 17:02
11:51 18:02
12:15 19:02
12:51 20:02
13:15 21:02
13:51 22:02
14:15 23:02
14:51  
15:15  
15:51  
16:15  
16:51  
17:15  
17:51  
18:15  
18:51  
19:15  
19:51  
20:15  
20:51  
21:15  
21:51  
22:15  
22:51  
23:51  

Bus M1 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official website of AD Mobility or follow this link for M1 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Passengers can pay for their journeys on the M1 bus using the Hafilat Card, Abu Dhabi’s cashless payment system. The fare for travel within one zone is AED 2, with additional charges of AED 0.05 per kilometer. Hafilat cards can be easily topped up online or at kiosks located throughout the city, ensuring a seamless travel experience.

Route Overview

The M1 bus route runs between Dalma Mall Main Entrance and Capital Mall, passing through various key locations that highlight Abu Dhabi’s vibrant community. Below is a complete list of stops along this route:

  1. Dalma Mall Main Entrance The starting point, offering a variety of shopping and dining options.

  2. Dalma Mall West A secondary entrance providing additional access to the mall.

  3. Al Saqlawi Street A residential area with local amenities.

  4. Al Basrah Street Another local street providing community access.

  5. Emirates Identity Authority Factory A significant landmark for identity services.

  6. Western Region Development Council A governmental body focused on regional development.

  7. First Abu Dhabi Bank A key financial institution along the route.

  8. Al Daraj Street A residential stop that caters to local traffic.

  9. Emirates Heritage Club A cultural center celebrating the UAE’s heritage.

  10. Hamir Street A quieter street for local traffic.

  11. Abdullah bin Qais Al-Ansari Mosque (two stops) A notable spiritual landmark.

  12. Al Qa-id Street Another residential area with easy access.

  13. Mohammed Bin Zayed Health Care Center A vital healthcare facility.

  14. Ali Ghurair Al-Rumaithi Mosque A mosque serving the community’s spiritual needs.

  15. Shaikha Fatima Bint Mubarak Mosque Another significant religious site.

  16. Mubarak Bin Qirran Almansoori Mosque A cultural and spiritual landmark.

  17. Al Manazif Street A residential street offering local access.

  18. Al Abrar Mosque A spiritual stop along the way.

  19. Al ‘ardah Street Another local street providing access to nearby areas.

  20. Al Fan Street A street contributing to the local community.

  21. Muhammed Bin Harib Mosque (two stops) A spiritual landmark.

  22. Mazyad Mall (two stops) A shopping destination for residents.

  23. Capital Mall The final stop, leading to a major shopping and entertainment hub.

  24. Emirates Transport A transport facility offering additional travel options.

  25. Street 15 A street that connects various local areas.

  26. Sharjah Islamic Bank Another financial institution along the route.

  27. Ali Khalfan Rashid Al Mutawa Al Daheri Mosque A significant religious landmark.

  28. ADNOC Vehicle Inspection Centre A center for vehicle services.

  29. Mar Thoma Church A place of worship for the local community.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Ahalia Hospital A healthcare facility catering to residents.

  2. Village Mall A shopping center for local residents.

  3. Street 15 Another key local road.

  4. Street 13 A residential area with community access.

  5. Street 11 Another local street providing access.

  6. Street 14 A street connecting to various neighborhoods.

  7. Street 16 A residential road serving the community.

  8. ICAD Residential City Gate XX An entrance to a residential community.

  9. ICAD Residential City Gate 2 Another residential access point.

  10. Street 11 A repeat stop providing local access.

  11. Street 13 Another key road in the community.

  12. Civil Defence A stop for public safety services.

  13. Al Jimi Worker Village A residential area for workers.

  14. Street 15 A repeat stop providing community access.

  15. Drivers and Vehicles Licensing Department A key government service location.

  16. Street 18 A street connecting various local areas.

  17. Dalma Mall Main Entrance The return point for the route.

Some other Abu Dhabi bus routes you can check out include the X5 bus route, which runs from Corniche Hospital to Al Maqta Bus Interchange, and the 210 route, which travels from Al Shahama Bus Station to Dalma Mall.

Accessibility and Services

The M1 bus is designed to be accessible for all passengers, ensuring a comfortable journey for everyone. Features include:

  • Ramps for wheelchair access.

  • Designated seating for those with mobility challenges.
  • Audio-visual aids for passengers with hearing or vision impairments.

These facilities make the M1 bus an inclusive travel option for all commuters.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Along the journey, passengers can explore several major attractions and landmarks:

  1. Dalma Mall One of Abu Dhabi’s largest shopping centers, offering a wide range of shops and dining options.

  2. Mazyad Mall A popular destination for shopping and entertainment, providing a variety of services.

  3. Emirates Heritage Club A cultural institution showcasing the heritage and traditions of the UAE.

Journey Experience

Taking the M1 bus from Dalma Mall to Capital Mall provides a delightful journey through Abu Dhabi’s vibrant culture and key landmarks. As it navigates local streets, passengers catch glimpses of cozy cafes and markets.

Notable stops include the Mohammed Bin Zayed Health Care Center and the Shaikha Fatima Bint Mubarak Mosque, adding a spiritual touch to the ride. The journey culminates at Capital Mall, where visitors can enjoy a variety of entertainment and shopping experiences, showcasing the social fabric of Abu Dhabi. This trip connects two major shopping hubs while highlighting the city’s diverse offerings.

Travel Tips for Bus M1

  • Plan Ahead: Check the bus timings to avoid long waits, especially during peak hours.

  • Use the Hafilat Smart Card: This allows for quick and cashless payment on all Abu Dhabi buses.
  • Monitor Bus Updates: Use the AD Mobility app for real-time updates and schedules to optimize your journey.
  • Avoid Peak Times: For a more comfortable ride, consider traveling outside of busy periods in the morning and evening.

The M1 bus provides a dependable and convenient option for traveling between Dalma Mall and Capital Mall.

Whether you’re heading to work, exploring the malls, or discovering the city, the M1 bus guarantees a smooth and cost-effective journey. Take a ride on the M1 bus and easily explore the lively areas of Abu Dhabi! Be sure to explore the complete range of bus routes available in Abu Dhabi for more travel possibilities!

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 31, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej

Al Khaleej is the lead editor at Dubai Time — covering UAE transport, banking, visa services, and city guides. Trusted by residents and expats across the Emirates for accurate, up-to-date local information.
